metadata.description: Unified service registry — 93 services (14 infrastructure + 32 micronauts + 47 integrated skills)
metadata.phase: H complete, Phase I in progress

data_harvester.name: Data Harvester
data_harvester.description: Autonomous URL loader — fetches GitHub, StackOverflow, arXiv, HuggingFace, Wikipedia for MM-CODER training

learning_engine.name: Learning Engine
learning_engine.description: Continuous training pipeline — spawns internet_harvester.py, hot-swaps MM-CODER model checkpoint
endpoints: POST /train   — start training { batch_dir, model_out } (202 async)

services.name: Verb Router (VR-1)
services.description: HTTP verb routing — GET (expand), POST/PUT/DELETE (accept) with SCXQ7 sigils

services.name: Skills Router (SK-1)
services.description: Unified skills routing — loads skill manifests and routes invocations

services.name: Web Research Bot (WR-1)
services.description: DDG + Brave scraper — builds bigram/trigram/coarse-grams, persists to grams.jsonl, XQL query, GGUF grounding

services.name: Session Memory (SM-1)
services.description: Session persistence — chat history, plans, state per session

services.name: GGUF Bridge (GB-1)
services.description: Ollama proxy on :5000 — exposes /v1/chat/completions, routes to best local model

services.name: Splash Cache Server (SS-1)
services.description: Static file server + cross-folder cache via /file?path=

services.name: PowerShell Executor (PSISE-1)
services.description: PowerShell/ISE script execution and environment management

services.name: K'UHUL Dependency Injection (KX-1)
services.description: K'UHUL DI container and micronaut initialization

services.name: Semantic Kernel Coordinator (CL-1)
services.description: Semantic Kernel multi-call orchestration and learning

services.name: Visual Studio Native Tools (PSISE-1)
services.description: Visual Studio x64/x86 native compilation environment

services.name: Visual Studio 2022 Tools (PSISE-1)
services.description: Visual Studio 2022 Community development shell and build tools

services.name: Windows SDK Validator (D3D-1)
services.description: Windows SDK headers, CMake integration, and DirectX validation

services.name: PowerShell ISE Environment (PSISE-1)
services.description: PowerShell Integrated Scripting Environment with layout and catalog

services.name: Google Vertex AI
services.description: Google Vertex AI and PaLM APIs

services.name: PowerShell Code Analyzer
services.description: Real-time code analysis and quality checks via PI Coding Agent

services.name: PowerShell Code Generator
services.description: AI-powered code generation via PI Coding Agent v2.0

services.name: PowerShell Wave Trainer
services.description: Wave function training and optimization via SH Wave Lattice

services.name: PowerShell Evolution Engine
services.description: Evolutionary optimization via SH Wave Lattice

services.name: PowerShell IDE Bridge
services.description: Visual Studio integration and IDE events via Studio Bridge Runtime

services.name: PowerShell Code Formatter
services.description: Code formatting and beautification via Studio Bridge

services.name: PowerShell Diagnostics
services.description: Code diagnostics and real-time error detection via Studio Bridge
